NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk K. Shaw, Not Reported. (206)

Appearances:
Rose Natan, assistant property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff John Stewart Company.
John P. Zanghi, Esq. representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Andrea C. Jenkins is present.
John R. Weinstein, Esq. representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, the trial date is off calendar.
